overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a character swimming through a moonlit canyon pool, then running along rocky shoreline paths and crossing a wooden bridge in a lush, mysterious wilderness environment with distinctive teal-green night lighting.

events.description: moonlight becomes visible through the canyon opening above
character exits the water onto the rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: swimming through the canyon pool toward the waterfall and shoreline exit

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
cascading waterfall at the end of the canyon pool
leafless dark tree growing from the right cliff face
calm reflective water of the canyon pool with teal-green highlights

segments.scene_description: The character swims through a narrow moonlit canyon pool enclosed by steep rock walls. A waterfall cascades at the far end while the moon becomes visible through the canyon opening above, casting an eerie teal glow on the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline trail under full moon

events.description: transitions from swimming to running on the rocky shore path
approaches a wooden bridge structure spanning the water

agents.ego_description: running along the rocky path through vegetation toward a distant wooden bridge

entered.detail: uneven dirt and gravel trail along the water's edge
large gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
silhouetted mountain range visible on the horizon
wooden plank bridge structure becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having exited the water, the character runs along an open rocky trail under the full moon. The canyon walls fall away to reveal a wide landscape with a distinctive twisted ancient tree and distant mountains, while a wooden bridge comes into view ahead.

events.description: steps onto the wooden plank bridge to cross the water
exits the bridge onto the opposite rocky shore

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden rope bridge and continuing to run along the path on the far side

entered.detail: rustic bridge made of wooden planks and thick rope railings
thick braided rope handrails along the bridge sides
faint orange glow of distant fires or lights on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a rustic wooden rope bridge spanning the water, with the moon illuminating the planks from above. After reaching the far side, the character continues running along the rocky trail toward distant lights visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a narrow moonlit canyon into a wide, open wilderness under a teal-green night sky. It begins with the character swimming through a confined pool enclosed by steep rock walls, moving toward a cascading waterfall as the moon emerges overhead to cast an eerie glow on the water. As the character exits the pool, the canyon walls fall away to reveal an expansive rocky trail featuring a twisted ancient tree and distant mountains. The scene then shifts toward a rustic wooden rope bridge that the character crosses under the direct light of the full moon. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the bridge behind and run along the rocky terrain toward distant lights flickering on the horizon.
